overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a journey through Night City. The player waits at a transit station platform, rides the NCART train through a rain-soaked neon-lit metropolis with towering skyscrapers, then walks along wet streets to another station entrance. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with heavy fog, wet reflective surfaces, and dominant green and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station platform with medical center signage

events.description: character stands up from bench and begins walking toward the train platform exit

agents.ego_description: sitting on station bench observing the platform, then standing up to walk toward the train

notable_agents.action: sitting on station bench waiting for the train

entered.detail: illuminated teal sign reading MEDCENTER with red medical cross symbols
metal and concrete bench with seated passengers
long overhead fluorescent tube lighting fixtures
illuminated vertical billboard displaying product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a covered transit station platform dominated by a large MEDCENTER sign. Fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete platform where a few passengers sit on benches. The player character sits briefly before standing and walking toward the train doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: moving train carriage with panoramic city views

events.description: character boards the train and the view shifts to the interior carriage
train accelerates through the urban canyon passing illuminated skyscrapers
train passes under an overpass briefly dimming the interior light

agents.ego_description: sitting on the train looking out the window at the passing neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: sitting on train seat drinking from a bottle and looking out window

entered.detail: large panoramic window showing passing cityscape and rain droplets
upholstered bench seat with textured fabric
towering futuristic glass buildings with illuminated windows against foggy night sky
large glowing corporate advertisements on building facades
green illuminated security fence passing by the train window

segments.scene_description: Inside the moving NCART train, the player sits beside a window watching the cyberpunk cityscape glide by. Neon billboards and towering skyscrapers emerge from the fog outside. Another passenger sits nearby drinking from a bottle. The train passes under an overpass, briefly darkening the carriage before emerging back into the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban street with transit station entrance

events.description: character exits the train and steps onto the wet street platform
character approaches the NCART station entrance and slows down

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk toward the glowing NCART station entrance

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction toward the camera

entered.detail: futuristic transit station entrance with distinctive yellow overhang and glass doors
red and white sports car with hood open parked on the street side
large vertical screen displaying video advertisements on building side
commercial shop front with bright green and red neon tube lighting
elevated highway structure with support columns crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Having exited the train, the player walks along a wet concrete sidewalk glistening with rain reflections. The NCART station entrance looms ahead with its distinctive yellow architecture and glowing signage. A broken-down car sits on the left while neon storefronts illuminate the right. The player passes under an overpass and approaches the station entrance as other pedestrians walk by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile transit platform through a neon-lit urban canyon and back onto the rain-slicked streets of the city. It begins on a covered concrete platform under the glow of a large MEDCENTER sign, where the camera moves from a seated position toward the opening train doors. As the player enters the moving NCART train, the environment shifts to a gliding interior view of towering skyscrapers and neon billboards emerging from a dense fog, briefly darkening as the carriage passes under an overpass. The scene then transitions to the outdoors, moving along a wet sidewalk glistening with reflections of neon storefronts and passing a broken-down car. Finally, the camera advances under another overpass, weaving through pedestrians toward the glowing yellow architecture of a station entrance.
